0.text: Smooth interlobular and interstitial septal thickening in both lungs

1.text: Paraseptal emphysematous changes in the upper lobes of both lungs, more prominent in the apical segments

2.text: Diffuse peribronchial thickening in both lungs

3.text: Increased density with ground-glass opacity in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe adjacent to the bronchovascular structure
